data.title: Xiong Chumo: Xiongxiong Bang Bang Tuan 4
data.synopsis:
Something big is happening in Forest Town again!?

Join the Helper Team for an immersive experience of traditional customs and feel the vibrant atmosphere of a traditional festival!

(Source: Douban, translated)

data.title: Tang Zhi Zhi Yi
data.synopsis:
A chance encounter between young Tang Zhi and a dragon maiden unexpectedly awakened his "Heavenly Eye"—allowing him to see gods and spirits roaming the mortal realm. These unique eyes led him into a world that coexisted with the mundane. Through unforgettable experiences, Tang Zhi made friends with all sorts of people and experienced laughter and warmth in seemingly ordinary yet subtly wondrous daily moments. An ordinary scholar, encountering and accompanying a group of gods and spirits with diverse personalities amidst the everyday life of the mortal world—this story of adventure, friendship, and growth is slowly unfolding.

(Source: Bangumi, translated)

titles.title: Xi Yangyang Yu Hui Tailang: Gu Guguai Jie You Guguai
喜羊羊与灰太狼之古古怪界有古怪

data.title: Xi Yangyang Yu Hui Tailang: Gu Guguai Jie You Guguai
data.title_japanese: 喜羊羊与灰太狼之古古怪界有古怪
data.synopsis:
The anion and cation orbs were stolen by a mysterious wolf pack, pointing the finger of danger directly at the Strange Realm. The sheep and wolves tracked them down to the Strange Realm, only to discover that Handsome Guy and Black General had also been captured and taken to the Inner Earth beneath it. To rescue the two eggs, the sheep and wolves resolutely set off for the Inner Earth. In their adventures through the layers of the Inner Earth, the sheep and wolves met various explorers, fought against unknown monsters, and braved mysterious dangers. After countless battles and intrigues, the sheep and wolves finally uncovered the conspiracy of the ruthless preserved egg factory, rescued Handsome Guy and Black General, and, with the help of the two eggs, thwarted the crisis caused by the wolf pack, protecting the peace of the Inner Earth.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)

titles.title: Tsuihou sareta Cheat Fuyo Majutsushi wa Kimama na Second Life wo Ouka suru. Ore wa Buki dake ja Naku, Arayuru Mono ni "Kyouka Point" wo Fuyo Dekiru shi, Ore no Ishi de Itsudemo Kouka wo Kaijo Dekiru kedo, Nokotta Hitotachi Daijoubu?
The Exiled Cheating Magician Enjoys an Unrestrained Second Life. I Can Give "Strengthening Points" Not Only to Weapons
and I Can Unlock the Effect at Any Time of My Will
追放されたチート付与魔術師は気ままなセカンドライフを謳歌する。 ～俺は武器だけじゃなく、あらゆるものに『強化ポイント』を付与できるし、俺の意思でいつでも効果を解除できるけど、残った人たち大丈夫？～

data.title: Tsuihou sareta Cheat Fuyo Majutsushi wa Kimama na Second Life wo Ouka suru. Ore wa Buki dake ja Naku, Arayuru Mono ni "Kyouka Point" wo Fuyo Dekiru shi, Ore no Ishi de Itsudemo Kouka wo Kaijo Dekiru kedo, Nokotta Hitotachi Daijoubu?
data.title_japanese: 追放されたチート付与魔術師は気ままなセカンドライフを謳歌する。 ～俺は武器だけじゃなく、あらゆるものに『強化ポイント』を付与できるし、俺の意思でいつでも効果を解除できるけど、残った人たち大丈夫？～
title_synonyms: The Exiled Cheating Magician Enjoys an Unrestrained Second Life. I Can Give "Strengthening Points" Not Only to Weapons
and I Can Unlock the Effect at Any Time of My Will
data.synopsis:
Rein, an enchanter who strengthens equipment with his magic, is suddenly expelled from his guild, simply because every piece of gear in the guild has already been enhanced enough. Outraged by the absurd treatment, Rein decides to take back the enormous amount of mana he had poured into their equipment. When he casually channels it into a random copper sword, it transforms into a cheat-level weapon with 10,000 enhancement points!

With zero combat experience but armed with magic that can turn anything into overpowered gear, this enchanter sets off to enjoy a new, carefree life as an adventurer!

(Source: Shochiku)

titles.title: 大賢者リドルの時間逆行
The Regression of Great Sage Riddle

data.title: Daikenja Riddle no Jikan Gyakkou
data.title_english: The Regression of Great Sage Riddle
data.title_japanese: 大賢者リドルの時間逆行
data.synopsis:
A young man named Riddle had lost all of his friends—and the entire world—at the hands of a mysterious organization known as the "Box of Malice." Having lost all hope to live, he dwelled in a pit of despair until he has one final revelation. What if... he could return to a time before everything ended? And so, after a thousand years, a deformed Riddle finally manages to reverse time. "I'm going to stop them this time...!" Equipped with a thousand years of knowledge and experience in his young body, the Great Sage Riddle's journey to the past now unfolds!

(Source: Shogakukan, translated)

data.title: Dao Yao Xing
data.synopsis:
Forced into a marriage of convenience based on mutual benefit, Jiang Yuan, an assassin from the Tai Xuan Tower, and Shao Yue, the holy maiden of the Jiu Xuan Sect, are ordered to marry. On their wedding night, they attempt an assassination, only to discover they are both immortal. To obtain the Demon-Suppressing Bell and the Demon-Controlling Bell, secret treasures of each other's sects, they transform from mortal enemies into a facade of marriage, engaging in a charade of mutual deception. 

However, neither is aware that the other is also an alien survivor whose home was destroyed by the "Void." This destined couple forms an alliance amidst suspicion and testing, not only searching for the treasures transformed from a lost spaceship but also confronting the ever-watchful cultivation world, seeking hope to defeat the "Void" amidst perilous circumstances.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

巴啦啦小魔仙之曜星守护者 第二季
data.synopsis:
A "dark veil" suddenly appears in the real world, prompting the little fairies to return to the Realm of Illusion to investigate. It turns out that the Realm of Illusion is being rebuilt, and Nightfall, along with her mysterious agents and the Dark Stars, has returned, attempting to dominate the magical world.

(Source: Douban, translated)

titles.title: ボーノーモのブスタマン

data.title: Buonomo no Busutaman
data.title_japanese: ボーノーモのブスタマン
data.synopsis:
Have you ever wanted to swap your face for a new one If it was easy to do - as easy, quick and cheap as buying a burger at McDonald's - everyone would do it. As soon as you get tired of one, just get another. But there is something you should bear in mind. In order to get a new face, you must first throw away your old one.

(Source: Official Site)
